nextjs.content:
• Learn how to create a new Next.js application with the `create-next-app` CLI, and set up TypeScript, ESLint, and Module Path Aliases.Using App Router. Features available in /app. Latest Version. 16.2.
• While installing Next.js using create-next-app@latest, select “No” for App Router to ensure compatibility with the examples.
• It builds a small but “real” app that shows the App Router, Server Components, Server Actions, optimistic UI, and data caching in Next.js 14. What you’ll learn. App Router file structure (app/, layout
